description.value:
Receive Proposal dispense request extra-voorraad-vakantie building blocks for patient C. van de XXX_Brugge
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_vvv_ontvangen
Original description: TEST VVV Extra voorraad vakantie
Scenario 1: Extra voorraad vakantie
Receive Proposal dispense request extra-voorraad-vakantie resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '2115468') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '6947') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '19429') ))).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '2115468|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (METOCLOPRAMIDE HCL ACCORD TABLET 10MG)
